## CSS Variables and Styling Report for iskrib_v3

Based on my comprehensive search of the client-side CSS files, here's a detailed breakdown of the key brand colors, gradients, and font choices used in the application.

### Key CSS Variable Definitions (from `index.css`)

**Primary Color Palette:**
- `--accent-purple`: #C4943E (warm golden brown - primary brand color)
- `--accent-amber`: #D4A853 (lighter amber variant)
- `--accent-sage`: #8A9E7A (muted green accent)

**Light Mode (Default):**
- `--bg-primary`: #FAF9F6 (off-white background)
- `--bg-secondary`: #F3F1ED (lighter neutral)
- `--bg-elevated`: #FFFFFF (pure white)
- `--bg-card`: #FEFEFE (card background)
- `--text-primary`: #1A1612 (dark brown-black)
- `--text-heading`: #12100D (darker heading color)
- `--text-secondary`: #6B6560 (muted text)
- `--text-body`: #8A8480 (body text)
- `--text-muted`: #A8A29E (subtle text)

**Dark Mode:**
- `--bg-primary`: #0C0C0C (near black)
- `--bg-secondary`: #141414 (dark gray)
- `--bg-elevated`: #1A1A18 (elevated dark)
- `--text-primary`: #F0EBE3 (warm off-white)
- `--text-heading`: #F5F0E8 (lighter warm white)

**Semantic Colors:**
- `--color-danger`: #DC2626 (red)
- `--color-success`: #16A34A (green)
- `--border-light`: rgba(120,100,80,0.12)
- `--border-card`: rgba(120,100,80,0.08)
- `--shadow-card`: 0 1px 4px rgba(80,60,40,0.06), 0 4px 16px rgba(80,60,40,0.04)
- `--shadow-modal`: 0 8px 32px rgba(80,60,40,0.12)

### Font Choices

**Primary Font Stack:**
- `--font-ui`: "Outfit" (sans-serif) - for UI elements
- `--font-serif`: "Lora" (serif) - for body copy and editorial content
- Alternative serif: Georgia, "Times New Roman"
- Alternative sans-serif: fallback to system sans-serif

**Google Fonts Imported:**
- Playfair Display (serif - for headers)
- Outfit (sans-serif - UI)
- Inter (sans-serif)
- Lora (serif)
- Nunito (sans-serif)
- Comfortaa (display)
- Lexend Deca (sans-serif)
- Patrick Hand (handwriting style)
- Shadows Into Light (handwriting style)
- Sniglet (display)

### Notable Gradients

**Authentication Pages:**
- Radial gradient accent: `radial-gradient(ellipse at 30% 30%, rgba(212, 168, 83, 0.08), transparent 70%)`
- Morphing animation borders for decorative elements

**Freedom Wall CTA Button:**
- Default: `linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(234, 179, 56, 0.1), rgba(255, 204, 51, 0.06))`
- Active: `linear-gradient(135deg, #e6a817, #d4960e)`

**Collections & Cards:**
- Sage gradient: `linear-gradient(135deg, #6B8F71, #4a7a52)` (green)
- Amber gradient: `linear-gradient(135deg, #D4A853, #C4943E)` (gold)
- Warm orange: `linear-gradient(135deg, #e6a040, #d4880a)`
- Dark gradient: `linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent-dark), var(--accent-dark-hover))`

**Badge Pills:**
- Legend badge: `linear-gradient(135deg, #FFD700, #FFA500)` (gold to orange)
- OG badge: `linear-gradient(135deg, #9B59FF, #7B2FFF)` (purple)
- Year badge: `linear-gradient(135deg, #3a3a3a, #555555)` (dark gray)

**Canvas/Editor:**
- Sage-Amber blend: `linear-gradient(90deg, var(--accent-sage), color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent-sage) 60%, var(--accent-amber)))`
- Complex paper texture gradients with radial overlays

### Glass Morphism Elements
- `--bg-glass`: rgba(255,255,255,0.55)
- `--bg-glass-border`: rgba(200,180,150,0.2)
- Used with `backdrop-filter: blur(25px)` for frosted glass effects

### Color Scheme Philosophy
The app employs an **editorial/literary aesthetic** inspired by Medium and Substack:
- Warm, neutral earth tones (golds, browns, sage greens)
- Excellent contrast with dark typography on light backgrounds
- Subtle, sophisticated animations
- Glass morphism for layered depth
- Responsive dark mode with adjusted opacity values
- Serif fonts for editorial content, sans-serif for UI

### Key Files Referenced
- C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\index.css (main theme variables)
- C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\LoginPage\login.css
- C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\SignUpPage\signup.css
- C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\SideBar\sidebar.css
- C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\ProfilePage\myprofile.css
- C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\collections\collection.css
